local.title: Launch a défi
local.tagline: You know the city. Now challenge people to discover it.
bullets: Launch food, place, culture or help défis
Pull people to the spots you love

exploring.title: Take on local défis anywhere
exploring.tagline: Wherever you land, take on what locals built.
bullets: Take on défis launched by locals
Find the real spots, recommended by people who live there
Live the city like a local, not like a tourist

how.title: Three steps to meet people near you.

steps.title: Open the app
steps.desc: See who's around you and what's happening near you right now.

steps.title: Pick your mode
steps.desc:
Local. You know the city.
Exploring. You want to feel it.

steps.title: Jump in
steps.desc: Launch a défi, join an event, or open your own spot. Real life starts here.

concept.title:
Not another social network.
Your city, live.
rules: No followers. No feeds. No algorithms.
Launch a défi. See who's around. Join what's happening near you.
Real people. Real places. Right now.

seo: Hilads is a real-time social app where you launch local défis, meet people nearby and discover what's happening in your city. Take on a défi from a local in Paris, find what's on tonight in Barcelona, or launch one in Lisbon — Hilads shows you the city, live. No account needed. Just show up.

repeat.titleGeneric: Your city is live right now.
